privileged_info_summary: DreamPlan is a real home design software by NCH Software that runs on Windows 11. The task requires converting a room in the default sample house project into a home gym by placing at least 2 distinct pieces of gym equipment (1 cardio machine like treadmill/elliptical, and 1 strength training item like weight bench/dumbbells) from DreamPlan's furniture library, changing the room's flooring to gym-appropriate material (rubber, carpet, or cork), and exporting the final design as a PNG screenshot to C:\Users\Docker\Documents\gym_design.png. The minimum output file size is 10 KB. Task parameters: 300-second timeout (5 minutes), maximum 40 steps, medium difficulty, sparse reward type. DreamPlan provides intuitive 3D design visualization with a furniture library containing multiple object categories (Furniture, Cabinets, Appliances, Electronics, Lighting, and Misc) and supports changing flooring materials and exporting designs in multiple formats including PNG.
